description: Use this API to report the results of the AC contingency calculation function. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = pp_accc(options, intval, realval, accfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying reporting options. (input).

parameters.name: intval
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying integer reporting parameters. (input).

parameters.name: realval
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying real reporting parameters. (input).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Name of the contingency solution output file. (input; no default allowed).

options.description: contingency case rating (rating set program option setting by default).
exclude interfaces from report (0 by default).
run voltage limit check (0 by default).
exclude cases with no overloads from non-spreadsheet overload report (0 by default).

intval.description: number of low voltage range violations (0 by default).
number of high voltage range violations (0 by default).
number of voltage deviation violations (0 by default).
number of buses in the largest disconnected island (0 by default).
maximum number of elements in available capacity table (no limit by default).

realval.description: percent of flow rating (100.0 by default).
minimum contingency case flow change for overload report (0.0 by default).
cutoff threshold for available capacity table (99999.0 by default).
minimum contingency case voltage change for range violations (0.0 by default).
bus mismatch converged tolerance (MW or Mvar) (0.5 by default).
system mismatch converged tolerance (MVA) (5.0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
